text: Traced the 'verify_gimple failed' ICE through GCC: (1) `gcc/tree-cfg.cc` implements `verify_gimple_in_seq` (line 5244) which calls `verify_gimple_in_seq_2` and on failure calls `internal_error("%<verify_gimple%> failed")` at line 5249. (2) `verify_gimple_stmt` is also in `gcc/tree-cfg.cc` (line 5034) — it dispatches to per-statement-type verifiers via a switch on `gimple_code(stmt)`. (3) `internal_error` (the ICE handler) is defined in `gcc/diagnostic-global-context.cc` (line 776), which calls `global_dc->diagnostic_impl()` with `diagnostics::kind::ice`. (4) GIMPLE verification is NOT a separate pass in `passes.def`; instead it is triggered via the `TODO_verify_il` flag (defined in `gcc/tree-pass.h` line 71) which is automatically ORed into `execute_todo()` after every pass in `gcc/passes.cc` (line 2702). The `execute_todo` function (passes.cc:2093) checks this flag and calls either `verify_gimple_in_cfg` (for CFG-based IR) or `verify_gimple_in_seq` (for sequence-based IR). `verify_gimple_in_cfg` (tree-cfg.cc:5443) also emits the same 'verify_gimple failed' ICE at line 5599.
